sources.name: Consumet KickAssAnime (JP + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: KickAssAnime through Consumet. Use a public CONSUMET_API URL for Vercel/online mode; local http://localhost:3000 is only for your PC. Returns HLS/M3U8 sources and subtitle tracks when the selected server provides them.

sources.name: AniPub
sources.description: Online AniPub catalog addon loaded from all AniPub catalog pages with /api/info/:id gap filling. Direct mp4/m3u8 links use the main player; iframe links play inside ZenkaiTV with the embedded player.

sources.name: Local Finder
sources.description: Hidden playback source for anime_finder.py / scraper anime_metadata.json results. It unlocks the source picker when an exact season and episode has a playable URL, iframe, resolver, or source option.

sources.name: Anime1v (Japanese + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: Anime1v-compatible proxy for Japanese audio with Spanish subtitles when available. Use a public ANIME1V_API URL for Vercel/online mode, or http://localhost:3001 for local PC mode.

sources.name: RapidAPI Anime Streaming (JP + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: RapidAPI Anime Streaming source for direct HLS/M3U8 streams. ZenkaiTV prefers Japanese audio and Spanish subtitles; if only English subtitle files are returned, the player can use Spanish translation mode.
